features.name: area
features.description: Area of the complete delineated basin polygon in square kilometres.

features.name: gauge_lat
features.description: Gauge latitude sourced directly from the canonical basin latitude.

features.name: gauge_lon
features.description: Gauge longitude sourced directly from the canonical basin longitude.

features.name: ele_mt_sav
features.description: Area-weighted mean elevation within the basin.

features.name: slp_dg_sav
features.description: Area-weighted mean terrain slope within the basin.

features.name: sgr_dk_sav
features.description: Area-weighted mean stream gradient within the basin.

features.name: lka_pc_sse
features.description: Area-weighted lake extent as a percentage of basin area.

features.name: dor_pc_pva
features.description: Degree of regulation from the most-downstream intersecting HydroATLAS polygon.

features.name: clz_cl_smj
features.description: Area-majority climate-zone class code within the basin.

features.name: tmp_dc_syr
features.description: Area-weighted mean annual air temperature.

features.name: pre_mm_syr
features.description: Area-weighted mean annual precipitation.

features.name: pet_mm_syr
features.description: Area-weighted mean annual potential evapotranspiration.

features.name: aet_mm_syr
features.description: Area-weighted mean annual actual evapotranspiration.

features.name: ari_ix_sav
features.description: Area-weighted mean aridity index.

features.name: cmi_ix_syr
features.description: Area-weighted mean annual climate moisture index.

features.name: snw_pc_syr
features.description: Area-weighted mean annual snow-cover extent.

features.name: snw_pc_smx
features.description: Area-weighted maximum monthly snow-cover extent.

features.name: snw_pc_smn
features.description: Minimum of the twelve area-weighted monthly snow-cover extents.

features.name: for_pc_sse
features.description: Area-weighted forest extent as a percentage of basin area.

features.name: crp_pc_sse
features.description: Area-weighted cropland extent as a percentage of basin area.

features.name: pst_pc_sse
features.description: Area-weighted pasture extent as a percentage of basin area.

features.name: ire_pc_sse
features.description: Area-weighted irrigated-area extent as a percentage of basin area.

features.name: gla_pc_sse
features.description: Area-weighted glacier extent as a percentage of basin area.

features.name: prm_pc_sse
features.description: Area-weighted permafrost extent as a percentage of basin area.

features.name: glc_cl_smj
features.description: Area-majority GLC2000 land-cover class code within the basin.

features.name: cly_pc_sav
features.description: Area-weighted clay content of basin soils.

features.name: slt_pc_sav
features.description: Area-weighted silt content of basin soils.

features.name: snd_pc_sav
features.description: Area-weighted sand content of basin soils.

features.name: soc_th_sav
features.description: Area-weighted soil organic carbon content.

features.name: swc_pc_syr
features.description: Area-weighted annual soil water content.

features.name: lit_cl_smj
features.description: Area-majority lithological class code within the basin.

features.name: kar_pc_sse
features.description: Area-weighted karst extent as a percentage of basin area.

features.name: rdd_mk_sav
features.description: Area-weighted road density within the basin.

features.name: hdi_ix_sav
features.description: Area-weighted Human Development Index.

features.name: p_mean
features.description: Mean daily catchment precipitation over the climatology window.

features.name: pet_mean_ERA5_LAND
features.description: Mean daily ERA5-Land potential evapotranspiration over the climatology window.

features.name: aridity_ERA5_LAND
features.description: Ratio of mean ERA5-Land potential evapotranspiration to mean precipitation.

features.name: frac_snow
features.description: Fraction of monthly precipitation occurring in months with mean temperature below zero degrees Celsius.

features.name: moisture_index_ERA5_LAND
features.description: Mean monthly ERA5-Land moisture index over the climatology window.

features.name: seasonality_ERA5_LAND
features.description: Range of monthly ERA5-Land moisture-index values over the climatology window.

features.name: high_prec_freq
features.description: Fraction of observed days with precipitation at least five times mean daily precipitation.

features.name: high_prec_dur
features.description: Mean duration of consecutive high-precipitation spells.

features.name: low_prec_freq
features.description: Fraction of observed days with precipitation below one millimetre.

features.name: low_prec_dur
features.description: Mean duration of consecutive low-precipitation spells.
